title: Password Policy
description: Passwords must be at least 12 characters long, include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters. Passwords expire every 90 days.

title: VPN Policy
description: VPN access is required for all remote work. Use company-provided VPN client. Access logs are monitored.

title: Leave Policy
description: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid leave per year. Leave requests must be submitted 3 days in advance.

title: Remote Work Policy
description: Remote work is allowed 3 days per week. Employees must be available during core hours (9 AM - 5 PM).

title: Laptop Usage Policy
description: Company laptops are for business use only. Report any damage immediately. Do not install unauthorized software.
